channel.title: teaching on Floris den Hengst's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in teaching on Floris den Hengst's Homepage

item.title: HIAL Guest Lecture
item.description: Today I gave a guest lecture for the course Human-interactive Agent Learning. I presented SHARPIE, our tool for controlled human-RL experiments. During the lecture, I showed how SHARPIE can be used to implement a simple evaluative feedback experiment using TAMEr in the MountainCar environment. Nothing beats putting the pressure on as a bit of live coding does, but then it remains so much fun when you can actually show how simple it is to implement this experiment with the right tools at hand.
